noticesAndObligations: The Apache-2.0 source and CLI license is included in the published package.
THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md is included at source, CLI, and packaged-runtime boundaries.
Bundled React MIT and Noto Sans Devanagari OFL-1.1 license texts are included with their browser assets.
FFmpeg and FFprobe are not bundled and remain external system tools supplied by the user.
The reviewed HyperFrames 0.7.58 CLI/runtime subset is vendored with its Apache-2.0 notice and per-file integrity hashes.
Registry-resolved runtime dependencies retain their upstream licenses and are recorded in the frozen dependency inventory.
reReviewCondition: Review again whenever the dependency inventory identity, package contents, licensing terms, or public distribution model changes.
